member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelClientWrapper
member.summary: Semantic Kernel implementation of ILLMClient for Hazina Provides multi-provider LLM support while maintaining Hazina interfaces

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelClientWrapper.GetResponseWithNativeStructuredOutput``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get typed response using native SK structured output (OpenAI, Azure only)

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelClientWrapper.GetResponseWithSchemaInjection``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get typed response using schema injection (works with all providers)

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelClientWrapper.SupportsNativeStructuredOutput
member.summary: Check if provider supports native structured output

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelClientWrapper.GetResponseStreamWithSchemaInjection``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.Action{System.String},Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{ImageData},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get typed streaming response with schema injection and partial JSON parsing

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelClientWrapper.RegisterToolsInKernel(Hazina.LLMs.IToolsContext,System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register tools from IToolsContext into the kernel as plugins

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.LLMProvider
member.summary: Supported LLM providers for Semantic Kernel.

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig
member.summary: Configuration for Microsoft Semantic Kernel LLM integration. Supports multiple providers with advanced settings.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.Provider
member.summary: The LLM provider to use.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.DeploymentName
member.summary: Azure OpenAI deployment name (only for AzureOpenAI provider).

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.ImageModel
member.summary: Model for image generation.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.EmbeddingModel
member.summary: Model for embeddings.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.TtsModel
member.summary: Model for text-to-speech.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.Temperature
member.summary: Temperature for generation (0.0-2.0).

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.MaxTokens
member.summary: Maximum tokens to generate.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.TopP
member.summary: Top-p sampling parameter.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.FrequencyPenalty
member.summary: Frequency penalty for generation.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.PresencePenalty
member.summary: Presence penalty for generation.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.UseNativeStructuredOutput
member.summary: Whether to use native structured output when available.

member.name: P:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.FallbackToSchemaInjection
member.summary: Whether to fall back to schema injection if native structured output fails.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.Load
member.summary: Loads configuration from appsettings.json. Falls back to "OpenAI" section for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.LoadWithFallback(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Loads configuration with fallback to OpenAI section for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelConfig.FromOpenAI(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates config from existing OpenAI config for backward compatibility.

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for converting between Hazina types and Semantic Kernel types

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ToSemanticKernel(HazinaChatMessage)
member.summary: Convert HazinaChatMessage to Semantic Kernel ChatMessageContent

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ToHazina(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ChatMessageContent)
member.summary: Convert Semantic Kernel ChatMessageContent to HazinaChatMessage

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ToSemanticKernelChatHistory(System.Collections.Generic.List{HazinaChatMessage})
member.summary: Convert list of HazinaChatMessage to Semantic Kernel ChatHistory

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ToHazina(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ChatCompletion.ChatHistory)
member.summary: Convert Semantic Kernel ChatHistory to list of HazinaChatMessage

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ToSemanticKernel(HazinaMessageRole)
member.summary: Convert HazinaMessageRole to Semantic Kernel AuthorRole

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ToHazina(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.ChatCompletion.AuthorRole)
member.summary: Convert Semantic Kernel AuthorRole to HazinaMessageRole

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ExtractTokenUsage(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.FunctionResult,System.String)
member.summary: Extract token usage from Semantic Kernel function result metadata

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.UpdateTokenUsage(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.StreamingChatMessageContent,TokenUsageInfo)
member.summary: Extract token usage from streaming chat message content (deprecated - use SemanticKernelStreamHandler)

member.summary: Create an async enumerable wrapper for streaming with progress tracking

member.summary: Buffer streaming chunks for batch processing

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.HazinaSemanticKernelExtensions.ApplyResponseFormat(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.PromptExecutionSettings,HazinaChatResponseFormat)
member.summary: Convert HazinaChatResponseFormat to appropriate prompt execution settings

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelStreamHandler
member.summary: Handles streaming responses from Semantic Kernel and converts them to Hazina format

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelStreamHandler.HandleStreamAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable{Microsoft.SemanticKernel.StreamingChatMessageContent},System.Action{System.String},TokenUsageInfo,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handle streaming chat completion with callback for each chunk Enhanced with comprehensive metadata extraction and error handling

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelStreamHandler.ExtractTokenUsageFromChunk(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.StreamingChatMessageContent,TokenUsageInfo)
member.summary: Extract token usage from streaming chunk metadata

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelStreamHandler.ExtractFinalMetadata(Microsoft.SemanticKernel.StreamingChatMessageContent,TokenUsageInfo)
member.summary: Extract final metadata from the last chunk

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.SemanticKernelStreamHandler.UpdateTokensFromDictionary(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},TokenUsageInfo)
member.summary: Update token usage from usage dictionary

member.summary: Handle streaming with tool calls support (for future implementation)

member.summary: Semantic Kernel plugin for developer tools (git, dotnet, npm, build)

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.Plugins.DocumentStorePlugin
member.summary: Semantic Kernel plugin for DocumentStore operations Provides read, write, search, and list operations for a document store

member.summary: Get the plugin name based on store name

member.name: M:Hazina.LLMs.Plugins.DocumentStorePlugin.GetPluginDescription
member.summary: Get the plugin description

member.name: T:Hazina.LLMs.Plugins.ToolsContextPluginAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that converts Hazina IToolsContext tools to Semantic Kernel plugins dynamically

member.summary: Register all tools from IToolsContext as Semantic Kernel functions in the kernel

member.summary: Create a Semantic Kernel function from a HazinaChatTool

member.summary: Create a HazinaChatToolCall from Semantic Kernel arguments
